summary: CuratedConciergeSection testing on ALL pillar pages. The component renders correctly on Dine and Celebrate pages (both have backend implementation). Other pillars (Care, Stay, Travel, Learn, Enjoy, Fit, Paperwork, Advisory, Services, Shop) show error/fallback state because the backend's generate_curated_set function only has implementations for 'celebrate', 'dine', and 'fresh_meals' pillars.

critical.issue: Backend intelligence_layer.py only implements curated sets for 'celebrate', 'dine', and 'fresh_meals' pillars. Other pillars return empty arrays causing frontend error state.

integration_issues.issue: Component shows error state when API returns empty for pillars without backend implementation
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior - component correctly handles empty API response, but user sees error. Backend needs pillar implementations.

issues: Missing 'glass-card-dark' wrapper around CuratedConciergeSection (found 0 glass-card-dark containers but CuratedConciergeSection renders with 5 cards)

action_items: BACKEND: Add curated set implementations for remaining pillars in /app/backend/app/intelligence_layer.py - currently only 'celebrate', 'dine', 'fresh_meals' are implemented
Create pillar-specific concierge card data files for: care, stay, travel, learn, enjoy, fit, paperwork, advisory, services, shop
Verify glass-card-dark wrapper is consistent across all pillar pages (Dine has it, Celebrate might be missing it)
critical_code_review_comments: The CuratedConciergeSection component correctly handles empty API responses with FallbackCards/ErrorState - frontend is working as designed
Backend intelligence_layer.py line 632-634 returns empty for non-implemented pillars: 'logger.warning(f"[INTELLIGENCE] Pillar '{pillar}' not yet implemented - returning empty")'
The component only renders when userPets && userPets[0] which is correct behavior

success_rate.frontend: 100% (component renders correctly when data is available)

context_for_next_testing_agent: CuratedConciergeSection frontend component is working correctly. The issue is backend - intelligence_layer.py only has implementations for celebrate, dine, and fresh_meals pillars. Other pillars need: 1) Data files like /app/backend/app/data/{pillar}_concierge_cards.py 2) Import and case handling in generate_curated_set function. Test verified: Dine shows 5 cards (3 products, 2 services), Celebrate shows 5 cards. Care/Stay/etc show error due to empty API response.

care.reason: Backend returns empty - pillar not implemented in intelligence_layer.py
